description: Baseline: 75 structural diffs across 10 books. Martyr=0, 1984=0, ThreeBelow=3, HeatedRivalry=7, Elvis=6, ThroneOfGlass=5, SunriseReaping=8, Familiars=13, SecretsCrown=16, HungerGames=17

asi.breakdown: Martyr=0, 1984=0, ThreeBelow=3, HeatedRivalry=7, Elvis=6, ThroneOfGlass=5, SunriseReaping=8, Familiars=13, SecretsCrown=16, HungerGames=17
asi.missing_files_all_from: SecretsCrown (22 missing - likely image directory scanning issue or resource gap)

description: Fix </body> placement: single self-closing elements now have </body> on same line matching lxml serialization. Reduced from 75 to 71 structural diffs (-4).

asi.books_improved: HungerGames 17→16, Familiars 13→12, SunriseReaping 8→7, ThreeBelow 3→2, Elvis 6→5, HeatedRivalry 7→6, ThroneOfGlass 5→4
asi.hypothesis: Fix closing </body> placement for single self-closing HTML elements to match lxml compact serialization
asi.fix: In sectionXHTML, detect single self-closing HTML body content and put </body> on same line

description: Fix JXR image conversion: set correct MIME type (image/jxr) for JXR resources with empty mime field. parseResourceFragment was incorrectly setting image/jpeg, preventing JXR→JPEG conversion. 71→60 structural diffs, 22→0 missing files.

asi.bug: parseResourceFragment set JXR mediaType to image/jpeg instead of image/jxr when mime was empty. This prevented the JXR→JPEG conversion in buildResources from detecting JXR resources.
asi.fix: Set correct MIME type per format: jxr→image/jxr, jpg→image/jpeg, png→image/png
asi.impact: SecretsCrown: -11 structural (JXR refs→JPG), 22 missing→0 (JXR image files now exist as JPG)
asi.image_diffs_increase: 127→138 because JXR images now produce different JPEG encoding vs Calibre

description: Refine </body> placement: only compact for self-closing elements (ending '/>') and SVG. Non-self-closing single-line elements get standard newline before </body>. Fixes 1984 regression (7 diffs→0).

asi.bug: Previous fix put </body> on same line for ALL single-line HTML, not just self-closing elements. This broke pages with <a>, <div>, etc.
asi.fix: Narrow condition: only self-closing elements (ending with '/>') or SVG properties get compact </body>. Non-self-closing elements get standard \n before </body>.
asi.impact: 1984: 7→0 (was incorrectly getting same-line </body>), but kept the image-only page fix for HungerGames/Familiars/etc

description: Fix promoted image body: convert -kfx-box-align to text-align and remove width. 53→17 structural diffs (-68%). HungerGames 17→1, Familiars 13→0, Elvis 5→0, SunriseReaping 1→0, ThreeBelow 1→0.

asi.hypothesis: Promoted image body inherits width:100% from container, preventing class split. Convert box-align→text-align and remove width from body to match Python's create_container behavior.
asi.key_insight: Python converts -kfx-box-align to text-align in create_container (yj_to_epub_content.py:1335-1336). Go's promoted body bypasses this. Also width must be removed from body because Python keeps it on child img, not on body.
attempted_approaches: Full non-heritable property filtering → regressed Martyr by 54 diffs due to class ordering
Only box-align conversion → didn't split classes because width still shared
Targeted: box-align→text-align + delete width → correct, no regression
